description: Create a SERVQUAL-based service quality gap analysis survey in LimeSurvey (admin / Admin123!) titled 'Service Quality Gap Analysis - SERVQUAL 2024'. The survey must include two question groups: 'Service Quality Dimensions' and 'Overall Assessment'. In the 'Service Quality Dimensions' group, create a mandatory Array (Dual Scale) question (Code: SQ001) to rate 'Importance' (Scale 1: 1=Not at all Important to 5=Extremely Important) and 'Performance' (Scale 2: 1=Very Poor to 5=Excellent) for Tangibles, Reliability, Responsiveness, Assurance, and Empathy. In the 'Overall Assessment' group, include a Long Free Text question (Code: FEEDBACK) for suggestions. Enable anonymized responses and activate the survey.
